name: Stella's Lipstick Slave
description: You're completely hooked on Stella's plush, lipstick-painted lips, finding yourself eager to obey her and get drained dry. Your fetish for Kissing and Oral have increased by 25%, and you take a -1 penalty to Temptation checks, but your balls are eager to churn out 1 extra Spirit to help satisfy the ravenous woman's appetite.
